Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi M2 Bus Timetable - Mazyad Mall Loop Back to Mazyad Mall

October 27, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

One prominent route, the M2 bus, operates a loop from Mazyad Mall back to Mazyad Mall, passing several key neighborhoods and landmarks along the way. This guide provides a complete overview of the M2 route, detailing operational timings, major stops, and travel tips to help you make the most of your journey.

Operational Details

Bus M2 operates regularly throughout the day, ensuring that commuters and tourists have access to consistent service. Below is the detailed schedule for Bus M2, departing from both Mazyad Mall and the National Marine Dredging Company:

From Mazyad Mall From National Marine Dredging Company (Furthest Point)
05:58 06:54
06:31 07:27
07:01 07:57
07:31 08:27
08:01 08:57
08:31 09:27
09:01 09:57
10:01 10:57
11:01 11:57
12:01 12:57
13:01 13:57
14:01 14:57
15:01 15:57
15:31 16:27
15:54 16:50
16:31 17:27
17:01 17:57
17:31 18:27
18:01 18:57
18:31 19:27
19:01 19:57
20:16 21:12
21:16 22:12

Bus M2 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for the M2 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Passengers can use the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s convenient cashless payment system. Fares for journeys within a single zone are AED 2, with additional charges for longer distances. Hafilat cards can be easily topped up online or at kiosks throughout the city, ensuring a smooth travel experience.

Route Overview

The M2 bus route covers a variety of significant stops, connecting shopping areas, residential neighborhoods, and cultural sites. Here’s a breakdown of key stops along the way:

  1. Mazyad Mall: The starting point and a major shopping destination.

  2. Capital Mall: A vibrant hub for shopping and dining.

  3. Emirates Heritage Club: A site dedicated to local culture and history.

  4. Life Line Hospital: Offering vital medical services.

  5. National Marine Dredging Company: An important industrial stop.

  6. Al Nasr Street: Connecting local businesses and residential areas.

  7. Mohammed Sultan Al Yusuf Mosque: A beautiful mosque enhancing the cultural landscape.

  8. Al Sama Street: A key road facilitating access throughout the area.

  9. Muhammed Bin Harib Mosque: A significant place of worship.

  10. Nahash Street: Connecting various neighborhoods.

  11. Al Boum Street: A route through local communities.

  12. Mubarak Bin Qirran Almansoori Mosque: A cultural landmark along the way.

  13. Shaikha Fatima Bint Mubarak Mosque: Another important religious site.

  14. Malaqit Street: Providing additional residential access.

  15. Al Harwa Street: Linking various sectors of the community.

  16. Al Qa-id Street: Another residential connector.

  17. Naseem Al Barr Street: Connecting to surrounding neighborhoods.

  18. Al Thamoudi Street: A vital access point for local traffic.

  19. Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI: An educational landmark.

  20. Al ‘iffah Street: A route serving nearby residents.

  21. Hubour Street: A connector for local transport.

  22. Al Dar’an Street: Accessing important community areas.

  23. Hamir Street: Another residential link.

  24. Al Daraj Street: Enhancing connectivity in the region.

  25. First Abu Dhabi Bank: A key financial services stop.

  26. ADNOC: A vital service station along the route.

  27. Al Arzaq Street: Serving local neighborhoods.

  28. Al ‘atif Street: Connecting various residential areas.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Wadi’a Bin ‘amro Street: A useful route for local traffic.

  2. Emirates Steel: A significant industrial site.

  3. Tasameem Workers City: Providing essential services for workers.

  4. Gulf Steel Industries: An important industrial stop.

  5. National Petroleum Corporation: Another key industrial area.

  6. Friday Market: A local marketplace offering diverse goods.

  7. Medical Industries: A hub for healthcare services.

  8. ICAD Residential City Gate XX: An entry point for the residential community.

  9. ICAD Residential City Gate 2: Another key access point.

  10. Food Distribution Center: Supporting local food supply chains.

  11. Street 12: Providing access to local neighborhoods.

  12. Street 10: Another important residential connector.

  13. Street 16: Linking various community areas.

  14. Street 6: Serving as a key roadway.

  15. Street 13: Connecting different localities.

  16. Street 15: Another important thoroughfare.

  17. Abu Dhabi Municipality — Musafah: A significant administrative hub.

This extensive route meets the practical needs of residents while offering visitors a convenient way to explore several important sites in Abu Dhabi.

For other convenient options, consider the X60 bus that connects Abu Dhabi Bus Station to Liwa Mezaira’a Bus Station, or hop on the A40, which travels between Al Shahama Bus Station and Baniyas West Bus Station—both great choices for exploring the area!

Accessibility and Services

Key accessibility features include:

  • Wheelchair Ramps for easy boarding.

  • Reserved Seating for passengers with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-Visual Aids to assist those with hearing or vision impairments.

These amenities ensure that Bus M2 is an inclusive and accessible option for all travelers.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Passengers on Bus M2 have convenient access to several attractions in Abu Dhabi:

  1. Mazyad Mall: A popular shopping venue with diverse retail options.

  2. Emirates Heritage Club: Offers insights into the UAE’s rich history and culture.

3.

Journey Experience

On a recent trip, a traveler took the M2 bus from Mazyad Mall Loop Back to Mazyad Mall, experiencing Abu Dhabi’s vibrant landscape. Departing from the mall, they enjoyed sights like the Emirates Heritage Club, which highlighted the UAE’s rich history, and the striking Muhammed Bin Harib Mosque.

The route through Mohamed Bin Zayed City showcased the importance of education, while bustling Al Nasr Street buzzed with local shops and cafes. A highlight was the lively Friday Market, brimming with fresh produce and local crafts. The journey, rich in cultural and commercial experiences, reaffirmed the M2 bus as a convenient way to explore Abu Dhabi.

Travel Tips for Bus M2

  • Plan Ahead: Review the bus schedule to avoid peak travel times and ensure timely departures.

  • Use a Hafilat Card: This enables quick, hassle-free payments for a smooth travel experience.
  • Monitor Real-Time Updates: Use the AD Mobility app to stay updated on bus schedules and avoid delays.
  • Travel During Off-Peak Hours: For a quieter ride, consider traveling outside of peak hours.

Bus M2 serves as a reliable, affordable, and inclusive transportation option across Abu Dhabi, linking key shopping centers, residential neighborhoods, and cultural landmarks. Board Bus M2 to easily explore Abu Dhabi’s attractions while benefiting from convenient and frequent service throughout the day. For a comprehensive overview, check out the full Abu Dhabi bus route!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 27, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
